reason: All acceptance criteria verified. 8 core tables (users, conversations, messages, knowledge_base, platform_configs, escalation_queue, user_feedback, security_logs) with all required columns. pgvector extension, vector(384) in knowledge_base, JSONB dst_state, TEXT[] keywords, FK constraints. Phase 2 tables (emotion_history, edge_cases) and ivfflat index. All 13/13 tests pass. Coverage 100%.
